name: Region Group
analysis: RGN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.4600. Trade idea: entry A$2.4600, stop A$2.2374, target A$3.1278 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
